extra_slides.purpose: 첫 2초 시선 고정 - 충격적 질문으로 훅 생성
extra_slides.prompt:
Portrait 1080x1350. Bold typography-focused design. Clean white background #FAFAF7. Center: massive bold text in deep navy #1A1F36 Pretendard ExtraBold 80pt: '타이레놀 vs 부루펜
섞어 먹어도 될까?' — 2 lines, center-aligned, dramatic question mark. Bottom subtle teal #2D9B9B accent line. Top-right tiny: 소아과언니 navy 4 characters only. Minimal, high-impact, scroll-stopping design.

extra_slides.purpose: 용량 측정 실사 - 시럽 계량 장면으로 구체성 강화
extra_slides.prompt: Portrait 1080x1350. Close-up product photography. Softbox studio lighting. Mother's hand holding medicine measuring syringe (5mL transparent plastic) above two medicine bottles - pink Tylenol syrup and orange-red Brufen syrup on clean white surface. Syringe shows clear measurement markings. Soft shadows. Professional healthcare documentation style. Sharp focus on syringe graduations. Warm natural light from left. Editorial clean aesthetic. Korean mother/father, East Asian appearance, Korean parent

extra_slides.purpose: 교차복용 타이밍 실사 - 시계/타이머로 간격 시각화
extra_slides.prompt: Portrait 1080x1350. Lifestyle close-up. Smartphone timer screen showing '3:00:00' (3 hours) on white surface next to medicine bottle and glass of water. Soft afternoon window light. Parent's hand touching phone screen. Clean minimal composition. Shallow depth of field - timer in sharp focus, bottle slightly blurred background. Warm domestic setting. Editorial healthcare photography style. Teal #2D9B9B subtle accent on timer display edge. Korean mother/father, East Asian appearance, Korean parent

extra_slides.purpose: 주의 상황 실사 - 아이 컨디션 체크하는 부모 손동작
extra_slides.prompt: Portrait 1080x1350. Intimate parenting moment close-up. Parent's gentle hand checking child's forehead temperature - soft caring gesture. Child's face partially visible (focus on parent's hand and gesture, not full face). Warm soft natural light from window. Cozy home bedroom setting with white bedding. Shallow depth of field. Emotional warmth. Documentary-style candid healthcare moment. Skin tones natural and soft. Coral #FF6B6B subtle color grading accent on worry/care emotion. Korean baby, East Asian facial features, chubby cheeks; Korean mother/father, East Asian appearance, Korean parent
